nodes.name: line_process_hourly_progress
nodes.summary: Adds 16 performance-tuning indexes across hourly progress, attendance, assignment history, daily plans/metrics, material transactions, day locks, shift closures, process WIP, and audit logs tables to speed up common query patterns.

nodes.name: audit_logs
nodes.summary: Extends audit logging with IP/session indexes and adds two reporting views (audit summary, recent critical changes) for monitoring sensitive changes.

nodes.name: defect_types
nodes.summary: Introduces the defect and downtime tracking subsystem: defect_types/defect_log and downtime_reasons/downtime_log tables plus daily summary views and supporting indexes for quality and machine-downtime reporting.

nodes.name: defect_log
nodes.summary: Introduces the defect and downtime tracking subsystem: defect_types/defect_log and downtime_reasons/downtime_log tables plus daily summary views and supporting indexes for quality and machine-downtime reporting.

nodes.name: downtime_reasons
nodes.summary: Introduces the defect and downtime tracking subsystem: defect_types/defect_log and downtime_reasons/downtime_log tables plus daily summary views and supporting indexes for quality and machine-downtime reporting.

nodes.name: downtime_log
nodes.summary: Introduces the defect and downtime tracking subsystem: defect_types/defect_log and downtime_reasons/downtime_log tables plus daily summary views and supporting indexes for quality and machine-downtime reporting.

nodes.name: products
nodes.summary: Adds a target_qty column (with index) to the products table so each product can carry its own production target quantity.

nodes.name: line_process_hourly_progress
nodes.summary: Adds a shortfall_reason column to line_process_hourly_progress so supervisors can record why hourly output fell below target.

nodes.name: employee_workstation_assignments
nodes.summary: Creates the core employee_workstation_assignments table linking employees to workstations on a line, with supporting indexes — the foundation of the live workstation assignment model.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstations
nodes.summary: Creates line_plan_workstations and line_plan_workstation_processes tables to model the planned workstation layout and process sequencing per line/date/product, with supporting indexes.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstation_processes
nodes.summary: Creates line_plan_workstations and line_plan_workstation_processes tables to model the planned workstation layout and process sequencing per line/date/product, with supporting indexes.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstations
nodes.summary: Adds an index supporting group_name lookups on the workstation plan table.

nodes.name: line_workstations
nodes.summary: Creates the line_workstations table storing static workstation codes and QR code paths per production line.

nodes.name: line_daily_plans
nodes.summary: Adds overtime_minutes and overtime_target columns to line_daily_plans, enabling an optional overtime session alongside the regular shift for a given line/date.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstations
nodes.summary: Adds a uniqueness index on line_plan_workstations scoped by line, date, and product to prevent duplicate workstation plan rows for the same plan context.

nodes.name: employee_workstation_assignments
nodes.summary: Adds an is_overtime-aware unique index to employee_workstation_assignments so regular and OT assignments for the same workstation can coexist without conflict.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstations
nodes.summary: Adds an is_ot_skipped boolean to line_plan_workstations so IE can mark individual workstations as not running during overtime.

nodes.name: line_daily_plans
nodes.summary: Adds a changeover_started_at timestamp to line_daily_plans to track when a supervisor activates a product changeover on a line.

nodes.name: line_ot_plans
nodes.summary: Creates the overtime planning subsystem tables: line_ot_plans, line_ot_workstations, and line_ot_workstation_processes, mirroring the regular workstation plan structure for OT sessions.

nodes.name: line_ot_workstations
nodes.summary: Creates the overtime planning subsystem tables: line_ot_plans, line_ot_workstations, and line_ot_workstation_processes, mirroring the regular workstation plan structure for OT sessions.

nodes.name: line_ot_workstation_processes
nodes.summary: Creates the overtime planning subsystem tables: line_ot_plans, line_ot_workstations, and line_ot_workstation_processes, mirroring the regular workstation plan structure for OT sessions.

nodes.name: line_ot_progress
nodes.summary: Creates the line_ot_progress table for recording supervisor-entered overtime output per OT workstation per date.

nodes.name: production_lines
nodes.summary: Adds a line_leader column to production_lines to record the assigned line leader's name.

nodes.name: employee_workstation_assignments
nodes.summary: Adds an is_linked boolean to employee_workstation_assignments distinguishing a confirmed (linked) employee presence from a mere assignment.

nodes.name: product_processes
nodes.summary: Adds a uniqueness index enforcing one sequence_number per product in product_processes, fixing a constraint gap that previously allowed duplicate sequence numbers.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstations
nodes.summary: Adds ws_changeover_active and ws_changeover_started_at columns to line_plan_workstations enabling per-workstation changeover so individual stations can switch product independently of the rest of the line.

nodes.name: products
nodes.summary: Adds a plan_month column (YYYY-MM format) to products for monthly production planning grouping.

nodes.name: group_wip
nodes.summary: Creates the group_wip table tracking work-in-progress quantity per process group per line/date, with a supporting index.

nodes.name: employee_workstation_assignments
nodes.summary: Changes the is_linked default to false and resets today's links so that assignments never auto-link employees — linking now requires explicit supervisor confirmation each morning.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstation_processes
nodes.summary: Adds an osm_checked boolean to line_plan_workstation_processes so IE/Admin can flag specific processes as OSM (operation sequence/measurement) observation points for the OSM report.

nodes.name: employee_workstation_assignments
nodes.summary: Adds a material_provided integer column to employee_workstation_assignments to record units of material/WIP given to a workstation at the start of the day.

nodes.name: employee_workstation_assignments
nodes.summary: Makes material_provided nullable (removing the default) so NULL distinctly represents 'not yet confirmed by supervisor' versus an explicit 0, and backfills previously auto-defaulted rows to NULL.

nodes.name: worker_departures
nodes.summary: Creates the worker_departures table to record when and why an employee left a workstation mid-day (sick, personal, operational, other), with supporting indexes.

nodes.name: worker_adjustments
nodes.summary: Creates the worker_adjustments table recording how a vacated workstation was reassigned in response to a worker departure, linked back to worker_departures.

nodes.name: product_processes
nodes.summary: Moves OSM-checked state from the daily plan level to product_processes so OSM selections persist per product rather than per day, and backfills existing checked flags accordingly.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstations
nodes.summary: Adds co_employee_id to line_plan_workstations so IE can pre-assign a suggested changeover employee per workstation, independent of live employee_workstation_assignments.

nodes.name: line_ot_plans
nodes.summary: Adds a supervisor_authorized flag to line_ot_plans so IE can grant supervisors permission to manage workstations and employees during an OT session.

nodes.name: employee_workstation_assignments
nodes.summary: Adds linked_at, late_reason, and attendance_start columns plus a check constraint to employee_workstation_assignments to track when supervisors confirm links, capture late-arrival reasons, and compute the effective shift start used for efficiency calculations; backfills existing linked rows.

nodes.name: employee_workstation_assignment_history
nodes.summary: Creates the employee_workstation_assignment_history table that records every assignment window (effective_from_hour to effective_to_hour) per employee/workstation/line/date, enabling correct attribution of hourly output even after mid-day reassignment or unlinking.

nodes.name: app_settings
nodes.summary: Seeds default working-hour app_settings (08:00-17:00 shift with a 60-minute lunch break) used as the factory-wide default schedule.

nodes.name: workstation_changeover_events
nodes.summary: Creates the workstation_changeover_events table capturing per-workstation changeover activation details (incoming product/workstation, assigned employee, feed quantity, start time), with supporting indexes.

nodes.name: line_ot_workstations
nodes.summary: Adds source-state and WIP snapshot columns to line_ot_workstations and line_ot_progress, preserving shift-end context for OT and keeping OT WIP separate from regular-shift WIP while supporting combined-flow views.

nodes.name: line_daily_plan_delete_markers
nodes.summary: Creates the line_daily_plan_delete_markers table to record soft-deletion of daily plans (who deleted, when) with a supporting index.

nodes.name: changeover_primary_promotions
nodes.summary: Creates the changeover_primary_promotions table recording when a changeover product is promoted to become the new primary product on a line, including a snapshot of prior state.

nodes.name: material_feed_events
nodes.summary: Creates the material_feed_events table logging material/WIP feed quantities given to a workstation group, including override tracking when feed exceeds the order quantity.

nodes.name: line_ot_workstations
nodes.summary: Changes the is_active default on line_ot_workstations to false so IE must explicitly activate each OT workstation rather than having it active by default.

nodes.name: line_plan_workstations
nodes.summary: Adds an is_custom_takt boolean to line_plan_workstations so the frontend can distinguish manually-overridden workstation takt times from auto-calculated ones tied to the live line target.
